final:
module top_module(
    input [31:0] data_in,
    output reg[31:0] data_out
);always @(*)
    begin
        if(data_in[31])                 
            data_out <= 32'd0;
        else
            data_out <= data_in;     
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      data_out <= ~data_in;
    end
  end

endmodule
